description: New infrastructure projects extracted from Twitter data and verified via web research

budget.notes: 150 new BS-VI diesel buses for SETC

timeline.completionNotes: Flagged off August 28, 2024 by Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin

sources.title: News9live - Tamil Nadu: 150 new BS-VI buses inducted into SETC fleet
Magzter - SETC gets 150 new non-AC seater-cum-sleeper buses

projects.notes: Features include front air suspension, individual charging ports, personal fans, SOS system, public announcement system, fire alarms; Part of plan to replace 260 over-aged buses; Last procurement was in 2020; Flagged off from Bus Workshop on Pallavan Road, Chennai

budget.notes: New 6-floor District Collector office on 7.67 acres

timeline.completionNotes: Inaugurated November 10, 2024 by CM M.K. Stalin

sources.title: Virudhunagar District Government - CM Visit November 2024
Social News XYZ - Stalin in Virudhunagar district

projects.notes: Part of CM Stalin's statewide tour to monitor government schemes; Located at NH 7, Kumaraswamy Nagar, Kooraikundu

name.en: Greater Chennai Corporation New Council Hall

budget.notes: New administrative building within Ripon Building complex

timeline.completionNotes: Foundation stone laid December 23, 2025 by CM M.K. Stalin

sources.title: Live Chennai - CM Stalin Inaugurates Renovated Victoria Hall

projects.notes: Foundation laid alongside inauguration of renovated Victoria Public Hall (Rs 32.62 crore); Part of state government commitment to conserving heritage structures while upgrading urban administrative facilities

budget.notes: Upgrade to double water supply capacity from 265 MLD to 530 MLD

timeline.completionNotes: Inaugurated September 20, 2025 by CM M.K. Stalin

media.photoCaption: Upgraded treatment plant doubling supply capacity

sources.title: APAC News Network - Tamil Nadu Govt to Inaugurate Newly Upgraded Chembarambakkam Plant
Chemical Industry Digest - Chembarambakkam Project to Double Chennai's Water Supply
EA Water - Chennai Boosts Water Supply with Upgraded 530 MLD Chembarambakkam Plant

projects.notes: Originally commissioned in 2007 supplying 265 MLD; Second pipeline faced repeated delays due to NHAI permission issues; Benefits over 20 lakh households in South Chennai including Anna Nagar, Adyar, Ambattur, Valasaravakkam, Teynampet, parts of Tambaram and Avadi corporations

location.city: Royapuram, Thiru-Vi-Ka Nagar, Anna Nagar (Zones V, VI, VIII)

budget.notes: Desilting and wall elevation of 10.8 km canal

timeline.completionNotes: Foundation laid August 2025; Tender finalization expected July 2025

sources.title: The Hindu - GCC Council clears resolutions on canal restoration
The Hindu - Chennai residents welcome Corporation's move to revamp Otteri Nullah

projects.notes: 10.8 km canal from Padi Flyover to Buckingham Canal; Maintenance transferred from Water Resources Department to GCC in October 2024; DPR includes bridge/infrastructure improvements, desilting, pollution control, encroachment prevention, blue-green corridor creation; Chain fencing included

budget.notes: Ropeway and waiting hall for hill temple

timeline.completionNotes: Inaugurated July 24, 2024 by CM M.K. Stalin via video conferencing

media.photoCaption: Rope car facility for 1,017-step hill temple

sources.title: The Print - TN CM inaugurates ropeway access to Rathnagiriswarar hill temple
The Federal - Tamil Nadu: CM Stalin inaugurates ropeway to Rathnagiriswarar hill temple

projects.notes: Part of larger HRCE temple development initiative; CM inaugurated 13 projects in 9 temples worth Rs 20.53 crore total; Temple has 1,017 steps; Ropeway faced technical snag due to high winds shortly after inauguration

name.en: Water Resources Department Projects (19 projects in 8 districts)

budget.notes: 19 projects including check dams, canals, dam reconstruction

timeline.completionNotes: Inaugurated October 7, 2024 by CM M.K. Stalin virtually from Chennai

sources.title: Construction World - Tamil Nadu CM Launches 19 New Water Projects

projects.notes: Key projects include: Check dam at Kavundayanvalasu village (Rs 11.05 crore), Check dam at Mambadi-Punganthurai village (near Dharapuram), Check dam across Kothavadi stream at Vadakkipalayam (near Pollachi); Water Resources Minister Duraimurugan also present at inauguration

name.en: Panchayat Union Office Buildings (17 buildings in 12 districts)
name.ta: ஊராட்சி ஒன்றிய அலுவலகக் கட்டடங்கள் (12 மாவட்டங்களில் 17 கட்டடங்கள்)

location.city: Coimbatore, Cuddalore, Erode, Kanyakumari, Pudukottai, Tenkasi, Thanjavur, Theni, Thoothukudi, Tiruchirappalli, Tirupur, Villupuram

timeline.completionNotes: Inaugurated November 12, 2024 by CM M.K. Stalin virtually from Secretariat

sources.title: Construction World - Tamil Nadu CM M K Stalin Inaugurates Infrastructure for Rural Development
Devdiscourse - Tamil Nadu Boosts Rural Development with New Infrastructure
ETV Bharat - TN CM Inaugurates Infrastructure For Rural Development Dept

projects.notes: Part of Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Department initiative; Virtual inauguration from Secretariat
